vocab.meaning: một sự may mắn bất ngờ
vocab.example: It was a stroke of luck when I won a designer watch as the grand prize in our company's annual lucky draw.
My sister happened to stumble upon a rare limited-edition watch and decided it would make the perfect birthday gift for me.
The unboxing experience was truly memorable, as the watch was nestled in a sophisticated mahogany case.

vocab.meaning: được thèm muốn/ao ước bởi nhiều người
vocab.example: To my surprise, my parents gifted me a highly coveted smartwatch that had been sold out for months.

vocab.meaning: một lời nhắc nhở hữu hình
vocab.example: Every time I check the time, it serves as a tangible reminder of my best friend's kindness and our long-standing friendship.

vocab.meaning: vẻ thanh lịch kín đáo (không phô trương)
vocab.example: The watch I received is a masterpiece of understated elegance, featuring a slim silver dial and a simple black strap.
My mentor gifted me a professional timepiece to commemorate an achievement after I successfully closed my first major deal.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tiền bạc
vocab.example: While the watch has significant monetary value, the thought behind the gift is what truly matters to me.

vocab.meaning: được chế tác một cách tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: The gift was a meticulously crafted mechanical watch, and I was fascinated by the visible gears on the back.
I hold this gifted watch in high regard and take extra care to ensure it doesn't get scratched or damaged.
